_meta_language_tagline: Full interface, hints, and system messages in English.
subtitle: All features of 4K Video Downloader Plus — free forever
mode_search_desc: Top search matches from the current platform
audio_language_hint_audio_mode: Pick the one track you want to extract. Multi-track video options are hidden in Audio mode.
audio_language_hint_all_tracks: Aura will keep one best separate track per language in one MKV. The selected language still stays first in priority.
audio_language_hint_selected_track: Aura will merge the best video with the selected language and use fallbacks only when that exact track is unavailable.
audio_language_hint_video_mode: Choose one preferred track for the final video, or enable all audio tracks when you want a multi-language MKV.
search_limit_hint: How many search matches should be downloaded from the current query.
auth_hint: Auth via browser — cookies are extracted automatically
auth_cookies_hint: For cookies.txt specify the path in Cookies field above
auth_browser_login_tip: Open built-in browser to sign in and automatically extract cookies
browser_open_tip: Open built-in browser and search inside the app
cookie_browser_hint: Sign in in this window. When the session is ready, click "Done".
cookie_browser_meta: The cookies file will be saved locally in Netscape format and can be reused for authenticated downloads.
discovery_browser_hint: Find media inside the app, open any page, then use the current page URL or start a download.
discovery_browser_meta: Type a direct URL or a search phrase. Search opens inside the selected platform when a native search URL is known.
auth_webengine_missing:
⚠️ Browser login requires PySide6-WebEngine module.

Install it:
  pip install PySide6-WebEngine

Then restart the app.
auth_login_no_cookies: ⚠️ No cookies extracted. Make sure you signed in.
output_container_hint: Force output container format (remux without re-encoding)
video_codec_policy_hint: Bias automatic format selection toward broad H.264 compatibility or newer VP9/AV1 codecs.
video_codec_policy_disabled_hint: Pick Auto target to control codecs manually, or choose a playback target and Aura will prioritize compatibility for you.
playback_target_hint: Prefer the most widely playable video and audio formats for the selected system or device.
compatibility_hint_multi_audio: Multiple final audio tracks require MKV, so MP4 is hidden while this option is on.
compatibility_hint_target: Playback target is active: Aura now prioritizes widely playable H.264/AAC-style formats for the selected device.
compatibility_hint_modern: Modern codec mode prefers VP9/AV1 when available. This can improve efficiency but may reduce compatibility on older players.
compatibility_hint_h264: Compatibility codec mode prefers H.264 so files open more reliably across devices and editors.
compatibility_hint_auto: Auto keeps things simple: Aura picks the best source and only remuxes when your container choice requires it.
format_panel_hint: Select a format and click "Select". Manual selection overrides quality selector.
recommended_browser_hint: 🎯 Opening the current page so you can browse recommended and related videos directly.
toolbar_preview_tip: Preview metadata, languages, and subtitles for the current link before downloading.
toolbar_formats_tip: Load all available formats for the current link and optionally choose one manually.
toolbar_recommended_tip: Open the current page in Aura browser and continue through recommended videos.
toolbar_action_media_url_only: This action works with direct media or playlist URLs, not plain search text.
toolbar_recommended_audio_mode_hint: Recommendations are based on the current video page and are unavailable in Audio mode.
preview_dialog_hint: Inspect thumbnail, duration, uploader, languages, and subtitles before you start the download.
preview_thumb_empty_hint: This item has not provided a preview image yet.
player_no_multimedia:
⚠️ Video player requires PySide6-Multimedia.

Install: pip install PySide6-Multimedia
player_empty_title: Open a file to start playback
player_empty_hint: Load a local video or audio file into Aura's player with the button below.
background_mode_hint: When closing the window, the app continues running in the system tray
smart_mode_hint: Setting presets — configure once, apply always
manual_selection_hint: Before playlist, channel, or search downloads start, choose the exact items to keep.
sb_hint: Mark or remove sponsor segments, intros, outros, etc. via SponsorBlock API
sb_action_mark_hint: Sponsor segments become separate chapters — you decide whether to watch
sb_action_remove_hint: Segments are physically cut from file (requires ffmpeg)
sb_force_keyframes_hint: Re-encodes at boundaries — no artifacts, but slower
sb_reencode_warn:
⚠️ SponsorBlock + Precise cuts

This mode will re-encode the entire video.
Downloading will take significantly longer.

Continue?
aria2c_hint: Splits file into parts and downloads in parallel
concurrent_videos_hint: How many videos to download simultaneously (for playlists/channels)
all_audio_tracks_hint: Keep one best separate audio track per available language inside the final video when possible.
all_audio_tracks_fixed_pipeline_hint: Aura will keep one best audio track per language in a single MKV when the source exposes separate audio streams.
all_audio_tracks_preview_probe: Aura will detect one best separate audio stream per language and keep them together in an MKV when possible.
all_audio_tracks_log_plan: 🎚️ Final file: keep one best audio track per available language in MKV when possible.
all_audio_tracks_mkv_forced: 📦 Container switched to MKV to keep multiple audio tracks in one final video.
import_state_confirm: Replace the saved Aura app state for all platforms from this JSON backup?
import_state_success: Full app state imported from {path} ({count} platform snapshots)
dm_auto_remove_completed_hint: Hide completed downloads from the history list automatically.
reset_confirm:
Delete ALL program settings and close?

On next launch the program will start fresh.
settings_up_to_date: ✅ Settings file is up to date ({count} keys)
log_ytdlp_titles_note: ⚠️ Note: translated titles are currently broken in yt-dlp (bug #13363)
log_ytdlp_titles_note2: Will work automatically when yt-dlp fixes it
theme_restart: Theme saved. Restart the app to apply.
theme_dialog_subtitle: Pick the look that feels most comfortable for long sessions. The features stay the same.
theme_dark_desc: High contrast and low glare for long evening sessions.
theme_gray_desc: Neutral tones with clear contrast and a calmer feel.
theme_light_desc: Bright, airy, and easy to scan during daytime work.
restart_mode: 🔄 Restart mode: downloading one at a time...
restart_run_failed: Restart mode aborted: yt-dlp exited with code {code} on run #{run}.
hero_subtitle: A clear workspace for downloads, history, presets, and routine tasks without digging through hidden menus.
hero_subtitle_compact: Compact pages for setup, downloads, automation, and system tools.
hero_guide: Start with the link and mode, then adjust quality, files, and presets only if you need them. The rest stays out of the way.
platform_dialog_subtitle: Switch platform defaults without rebuilding the rest of your setup.
platform_card_default: Download video and audio with platform-specific presets.
hero_flow_link_body: Paste a supported link and the rest of the workspace follows that context.
hero_flow_mode_body: Move between video, playlist, channel, and audio in one visible row of controls.
hero_flow_start_body: Run the job, watch progress, and keep history, presets, and subscriptions close at hand.
workspace_desc_setup_audio_track: Choose the preferred language for the final video, or switch to all audio tracks when you want one multi-language MKV.
workspace_desc_setup: Source type, quality, audio, and language options.
workspace_desc_download: Files, output behavior, bandwidth, and preview tools.
workspace_desc_library: Pending downloads and completed history in one place.
workspace_desc_system: Dependencies, theme, platform, and global controls.
workspace_desc_setup_source: Choose the source type and the starting mode for the current link.
workspace_desc_setup_video: Set video quality and metadata language for the current source.
workspace_desc_setup_audio: Control audio format, bitrate, and language behavior for audio workflows.
workspace_desc_setup_dubbed: Manage translated and dubbed audio export options in one place.
workspace_desc_download_options: Download behavior, subtitles, authorization, and advanced flags.
workspace_desc_download_files: Output folders, cookies, and browser-based authorization settings.
workspace_desc_download_tools: Bandwidth, container, formats, preview, and inspection tools.
workspace_desc_automation_presets: Smart Mode and reusable presets for recurring download flows.
workspace_desc_automation_subscriptions: Subscriptions, polling schedule, and new-item control.
workspace_desc_automation_session: Save, restore, and background behavior for long-running sessions.
workspace_desc_library_queue: The active queue with order management and cleanup actions.
workspace_desc_library_history: Completed history, filters, and quick management actions.
workspace_desc_activity_log: Queue updates, execution planning, and the full yt-dlp output in one dedicated page.
workspace_desc_system_tools: Dependencies, theme, platform, and global system actions.
sidebar_subtitle: Jump between sections, check the current state, and keep the main actions close.
execution_blueprint_hint: See the exact yt-dlp command, output folder, and anything blocking the run before it starts.
execution_ready_summary: The launch plan is ready. Command preview and pipeline details are shown below.
execution_blocked_summary: Resolve the execution blockers before starting the run.
execution_preview_empty: Set a URL and output folder to preview the exact yt-dlp launch plan.
execution_restart_note: The process is relaunched after each finished item until the archive is exhausted.
execution_issue_url: Add a URL before starting the run.
execution_issue_outdir: Choose an output folder before starting the run.
execution_issue_outdir_invalid: The selected output path is invalid.
execution_issue_outdir_file: The selected output path points to a file, not a folder.
execution_issue_outdir_create: Aura could not create the output folder. Check the path and permissions.
execution_issue_outdir_write: Aura does not have permission to write to the selected output folder.
execution_issue_ytdlp: yt-dlp is not available in PATH.
execution_issue_cookies_missing: Authorization is set to cookies.txt, but no file is selected.
execution_issue_cookies_not_found: The selected cookies.txt file does not exist.
execution_issue_ffmpeg_audio: FFmpeg is required for audio extraction.
execution_issue_ffmpeg_merge: FFmpeg is required to merge the best video stream with the selected audio track.
execution_issue_ffmpeg_remux: FFmpeg is required for forced MP4/MKV remux.
execution_issue_audio_language_unavailab: The selected audio language is not available for this video.
execution_issue_ffmpeg_sponsorblock: FFmpeg is required to remove SponsorBlock segments.
execution_issue_aria2c_missing: aria2c acceleration is enabled, but aria2c is not installed.
execution_warn_node_missing: Node.js is recommended for the most reliable YouTube extraction path.
section_mode_hint: Choose what exactly should be downloaded from the current link.
section_quality_hint: Select the preferred visual quality or keep maximum quality for the best source available.
section_audio_hint: Configure extraction format, bitrate, and source when downloading audio-only media.
section_options_hint: Control ordering, archive behavior, subtitles, acceleration, authorization, and advanced YouTube cleanup.
section_paths_hint: Choose where files are stored, how cookies are supplied, and whether browser login should be used.
section_smart_hint: Save complete download presets once and reapply them instantly for recurring tasks.
section_dependencies_hint: Track external tools required for media processing, acceleration, cookies, and playback.
section_app_hint: Switch platform or theme and manage global program state from one place.
section_history_hint: Filter previous downloads, sort them quickly, and clean completed entries without touching saved files.
section_bandwidth_hint: Tune bandwidth, remux container, inspect formats, preview metadata, or open the built-in player.
section_graph_hint: Enable a live throughput graph when you need to inspect real download stability over time.
section_subscriptions_hint: Monitor channels automatically, schedule checks, and push new items into the queue without manual searching.
section_session_hint: Keep recovery and background behavior under control for long-running or unattended download sessions.
log_panel_hint: Queue updates, current job progress, and yt-dlp output appear here.
log_file_hint: When enabled, new log lines are appended to a UTF-8 text file.
stopped_summary: The current operation was stopped by the user.
error_summary: The last operation finished with errors. Check the execution log.
enable_4kvd_shaming_hint: Allow sarcastic anti-4K Video Downloader Plus jokes in the activity log.
reset_everything_prompt:
Everything CLI was found.

Use it to search the whole computer for extra Aura Video Downloader save files before deletion?

The cleanup now uses two stages: Everything index search and a full deep walk of every accessible local disk.

Only known save files inside aura_video_downloader_settings folders will be removed.
reset_everything_found: 🔎 Extended scan: found {files} files and {dirs} folders for additional cleanup
reset_everything_walk_stage: 🧭 Deep drive scan: checking every accessible folder on every local disk...
joke_welcome: 💸 Free. No trial. No "buy PRO for $45" popups.
⚡ Powered by yt-dlp — just like 4K Video Downloader, but honest.
🎭 4K VD+ charges $45 for a yt-dlp GUI. We don't. Coincidence?
💎 Premium features for free? Not a bug, it's a feature.
🤡 4K VD+ broke after an update? Classic. We're stable.
🔥 Same yt-dlp, zero developer greed at $45.
💰 $45 for a yt-dlp wrapper? In {current_year}? Really?
joke_finish: ✅ Done! And all of this — for free. Imagine paying $45.
✅ Download complete. 4K VD+ in shambles seeing free competitors.
✅ Downloaded for free what others charge money for.
warn_audio_channel:
⚠️ Audio from the entire channel...

🤔 Have you considered that 90% of YouTube videos
without the picture are just weird sounds
and the phrase "as you can see on the screen"?

But who am I to stop you.
Continue?
folder_struct_audio_playlist: Channel folder / Playlist folder / number. title [id].{format}
restart_each_video_hint: (helps with long downloads and connection errors)
notify_on_finish_hint: Show system notification when all downloads are complete
debug_banner: DEBUG MODE — settings will NOT be saved
url_hint_playlist: Examples: youtube.com/playlist?list=PLxxxxxx  |  video link from playlist
cookies_hint: 💡 Click «Sign in» for automatic cookie extraction, or specify a cookies.txt file manually
nodejs_download_msg:
This will open the Node.js download page.

Download the LTS version, install it and restart your computer.
reset_settings_confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete all settings?

The program will close and on next launch
will ask to choose a settings folder again.
deps_startup_hint: Aura can start, but some tools are unavailable. Review how serious each missing dependency is before continuing.
deps_startup_footer_note: Open the System page if you want install buttons and detailed status badges.
deps_startup_impact_ytdlp: Core downloads cannot start until yt-dlp is installed or fixed.
deps_startup_impact_ffmpeg: Post-processing, stream merging, remuxing, and many audio/video conversions will fail.
deps_startup_impact_nodejs: Browser-cookie login and cookie extraction features will be unavailable.
deps_startup_impact_aria2c: Accelerated multi-connection downloads will be disabled, but regular downloads still work.
deps_startup_impact_everything: Fast Windows file search integration will be unavailable.
ffmpeg_install_hint: Download from ffmpeg.org and add to PATH
pywin32_install_hint: For better dialogs: pip install pywin32
nodejs_install_hint: Download LTS from nodejs.org and restart PC
error_invalid_url:
❌ Invalid URL format!

URL must contain a website address.

Examples:
• https://youtube.com/@channelname
• youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxxx
warn_not_youtube:
URL doesn't look like a YouTube link.

Continue anyway?
error_no_outdir:
❌ Select download folder!

Click «Browse with Explorer...» button
error_no_cookies:
❌ Select cookies.txt file!

Use browser extension to export cookies.
stop_hint: Next run will continue from where it stopped
download_exit_hint: This may be normal if some videos were already downloaded
download_zero_bytes_warning: ⚠️ Warning: downloaded file is 0 bytes (possibly corrupted)
setting_retries: 🔄 Retries:    infinite (5 sec pause between attempts)
folder_struct_playlist: Channel folder / Playlist folder / number. title [id].ext
vk_subtitle: Download VK Video in selected quality
vk_warn_audio_channel:
⚠️ Audio from all community videos...

This may take a VERY long time.
Continue?
vk_warn_not_platform:
URL doesn't look like a VK link.

Continue anyway?
vk_cookies_hint: 💡 Use the «Get cookies.txt LOCALLY» extension to export cookies from VK
vk_nodejs_not_needed: ℹ️ Node.js: not required for VK Video
sub_embed_hint: Mux downloaded subtitles into the final video file when possible.
sub_format_hint: Convert downloaded subtitles to the selected format.
generate_m3u_hint: Write an .m3u file next to finished playlist-style downloads.
execution_issue_ffmpeg_embed_subs: FFmpeg is required to embed subtitles into the final video.
section_queue_hint: Inspect pending items, change order, and remove entries before they start.
format_guardrail_default: Video-only selections will be merged with the selected audio track automatically. WebM/VP9/Opus formats work best with MKV.
format_guardrail_video_only: This format contains only video. Aura will add the selected audio track automatically in video modes.
format_guardrail_audio_only: This format contains only audio. It fits best in Audio mode.
format_guardrail_combined: This format already contains both video and audio.
format_guardrail_mkv: This codec/container combination is safer with MKV or Auto container.
format_guardrail_mp4_ok: Current MP4 container choice looks acceptable for this format.
format_selected_with_audio: Selected: {fmt} (the selected audio track will be merged automatically)
format_audio_only_warning: ⚠️ Selected format contains only audio. Use Audio mode if this was intentional.
format_container_auto_adjusted: 📦 Container switched to MKV for better codec compatibility with the selected format.
section_dubbed_audio_hint: Save translated or dubbed audio tracks as separate audio files after the main video download finishes.
dubbed_audio_hint: Use the audio language selector for one track, enter comma-separated codes for several tracks, or let Aura detect all available languages for single videos.
dubbed_audio_all_single_only: All available tracks can be detected automatically only for single video mode.
dubbed_audio_disabled_in_audio_mode: Separate dubbed audio export is disabled in Audio mode.
dubbed_audio_custom_missing: Enter one or more language codes for custom dubbed audio export.
dubbed_audio_preview_probe: All available dubbed audio tracks will be detected and exported after the main video download.
dubbed_audio_none_found: ⚠️ No separate dubbed audio tracks were detected for this video.
immersive_safe_hint: Helps avoid fragile MP4 remux choices for VR / stereoscopic media.
immersive_container_adjusted: 📦 Container switched to MKV for safer 360° / 3D compatibility.
execution_issue_ffmpeg_dubbed_audio: FFmpeg is required to export separate dubbed audio files.
batch_links_hint: Paste one link per line. CSV first-column links are supported too.
manual_selection_dialog_hint: Choose which items should be downloaded. Filter first if you only want a subset.
player_dialog_hint: Preview downloaded media without leaving Aura.
